info.title: XKCD Comics
info.description: Fetch comics and metadata from XKCD website in JSON format.

get.description: Fetches the current/latest XKCD comic and its metadata in JSON format.

200.description: Successful response with current comic data

example.alt: This is the graph that's seared into my mind.
example.title: Global Temperature Over My Lifetime

get.description: Fetches a specific XKCD comic by its ID number and returns its metadata in JSON format.

parameters.name: comic_id
parameters.description: The ID number of the comic to fetch

example.transcript:
[[A man with a beret and a woman are standing on a boardwalk, leaning on a handrail.]]
Man: A woodpecker!
<<Pop pop pop>>
Woman: Yup.

[[The woodpecker is banging its head against a tree.]]
Woman: He hatched about this time last year.
<<Pop pop pop pop>>

[[The woman walks away.  The man is still looking at the woodpecker.]]
Man: ... woodpecker?
Man: It's your birthday!

Man: Did you know?

Man: Did... did nobody tell you?

[[The man stands, looking.]]

[[The man walks away.]]

[[There is a tree.]]

[[The man approaches the tree with a present in a box, tied up with a ribbon.]]

[[The man sets the present down at the base of the tree and looks up.]]

[[The man walks away.]]

[[The present sits at the bottom of the tree as the sun sets.]]

{{Title text: If you don't have an extension cord I can get that too.  Because we're friends!  Right?}}
example.alt: If you don't have an extension cord I can get that too.  Because we're friends!  Right?
example.title: Woodpecker

safe_title.description: URL-safe version of the comic title

transcript.description: Text transcript of the comic (when available)

alt.description: Alt text / hover text for the comic

day.description: Day of the month the comic was published
